info.title: ClickUp MCP REST API
info.description: REST API for managing ClickUp workspaces, tasks, comments, docs, and time tracking. For use with ChatGPT Custom Actions.

servers.description: Production server (update with your actual URL)

get.description: Gets information about the currently authenticated ClickUp user.
Lists all workspaces (teams) accessible to the authenticated user.
Lists all spaces in a workspace.

post.description: Creates a new space in the specified workspace.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description: The space ID (used as the parent workspace context)

get.description: Lists all folders in a space.

post.description: Creates a new folder in the specified space.

get.description: Lists all lists within a folder.

post.description: Creates a new list inside a folder.

content.description: The description content of the list

due_date.description: The due date of the list in Unix time (milliseconds)

get.description: Lists all lists in a space that are not inside a folder.

patch.description: Updates an existing list. Only provided fields are changed.

content.description: New description content for the list

get.description: Lists tasks in a list with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of statuses to filter by

post.description: Creates a new task in the specified list.

assignees.description: Array of user IDs to assign to the task

due_date.description: The due date in Unix time (milliseconds)

get.description: Gets detailed information about a specific task.

patch.description: Updates an existing task. Only provided fields are changed.

post.description: Moves a task to a different list.

get.description: Gets the members assigned to a specific task.
Searches for tasks across a workspace.
Gets all comments on a task.

post.summary: Add a comment to a task
post.description: Adds a new comment to a task.

comment_text.description: The text content of the comment

assignee.description: User ID to assign in the comment

get.description: Lists all docs in a workspace.
Searches for docs in a workspace.
Gets time tracking entries for a workspace within a date range.

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: User ID to filter time entries by

post.description: Starts a new time tracking entry.

tid.description: The task ID to track time for

billable.description: Whether the time entry is billable

post.description: Stops the currently running time tracking entry.

bearerAuth.description: API key obtained from the registration dashboard

profilePicture.description: URL of the user's profile picture

task_count.description: Number of tasks in the list

due_date.description: The due date in Unix time (milliseconds)

url.description: URL to the task in ClickUp

list.description: The list the task belongs to

date_updated.description: Last update date in Unix time (milliseconds)

profilePicture.description: URL of the member's profile picture

comment_text.description: The text content of the comment

user.description: The user who posted the comment

date.description: The date the comment was created in Unix time (milliseconds)

workspace_id.description: The workspace the doc belongs to

task.description: The task associated with this time entry

user.description: The user who tracked the time

billable.description: Whether the time entry is billable
